name: MikeNetworks S.à r.l.-S.
notes:
### Route Server Peering
We peer with most route servers but **apply selective route filtering**:
- **Exports**: Not all routes are exported to RS peers (traffic/policy-based)
- **Imports**: Selective imports from RS peers 

**Peering via RS is welcome** but expect filtered views.
For full routing please setup direct bilateral peering.

### IX Peering
Open to peering with **all networks** at our IXP locations.
You can request peering on our automated platform of https://peering.as199839.net/

### Private Interconnects
Networks exchanging **more than 1Gbps** of traffic may request a PNI.
